summary: Exploratory QA covered MANUAL_RECIPE_CREATE base servings controls, invalid-save field validation, cooking-method selection requirements, selected ingredient summary placement/deselection, and active add button treatment. No unresolved blocker, major, or minor issue remained. Claude delegation stalled with a zero-byte response, so Codex completed fallback authority per user instruction.
remainingRisks: Claude implementation/authority could not complete because the provided resume session stalled with a zero-byte response; Codex completed fallback implementation and review per user instruction.
Real DB smoke was not run because this is a FE-only presentation and interaction change with unchanged API/DB/state transition contracts.
Actual mobile keyboard overlap remains manual-only because Playwright screenshots do not emulate device keyboard occlusion.
